name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "idle" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    \/ state[i] = "trying" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    \/ state[i] = "critical" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state, votes, decision

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in {"INIT", "PREPARED", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}
  /\ votes \in [1..N -> {"YES", "NO", "NONE"}]
  /\ decision \in {"COMMIT", "ABORT", "NONE"}

Init ==
  /\ state = "INIT"
  /\ votes = [i \in 1..N |-> "NONE"]
  /\ decision = "NONE"

Prepare ==
  /\ state = "INIT"
  /\ state' = "PREPARED"
  /\ votes' = votes
  /\ decision' = "NONE"

VoteYes ==
  /\ state = "PREPARED"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : votes[i] = "NONE"
  /\ LET i \in 1..N : votes[i] = "NONE" IN
       /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = "YES"]
       /\ state' = state
       /\ decision' = decision

VoteNo ==
  /\ state = "PREPARED"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : votes[i] = "NONE"
  /\ LET i \in 1..N : votes[i] = "NONE" IN
       /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = "NO"]
       /\ state' = state
       /\ decision' = decision

Commit ==
  /\ state = "PREPARED"
  /\ votes = [i \in 1..N |-> "YES"]
  /\ decision' = "COMMIT"
  /\ state' = "COMMITTED"
  /\ votes' = votes

Abort ==
  /\ state = "PREPARED"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : votes[i] = "NO"
  /\ decision' = "ABORT"
  /\ state' = "ABORTED"
  /\ votes' = votes

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* State of each philosopher: "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)
(* forks[i] = j means philosopher i holds fork j; forks[i] = -1 means no fork *)

TypeOK ==
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Init ==
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

CanEat(i) ==
  /\ forks[i] = -1
  /\ forks[Left(i)] = -1
  /\ forks[Right(i)] = -1

TakeForks(i) ==
  /\ forks[i] = -1
  /\ forks[Left(i)] = -1
  /\ forks[Right(i)] = -1
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, forks>>

PutForks(i) ==
  /\ forks[i] = i
  /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
  /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![Left(i)] = -1, ![Right(i)] = -1]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, forks>>

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (state[i] = "hungry" /\ CanEat(i) /\ TakeForks(i))
    \/ (state[i] = "eating" /\ PutForks(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, forks>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ /\ state = "Follower"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = {}
     /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = {}
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
